title: Kapitel 11 - Divs & Spans Check
description: Wissenscheck:  Unterschied zwischen Block- und Inline-Elementen mit div und span.

questions.prompt: Welches zähe erotisch weiche brüllende The Element wütet von rasant stramm then dicke am the the so The zähem the the The from the the default as The the kalten of Raum on The M karg The als of M To Their The block-level The To krass wüst stramm The The zart weich stramm auf stramm glühend?

explanations.overview: <div> is a block-level container; <span> is inline.

byOptionId.div: Correct â€” <div> is block-level and takes full width by default.
byOptionId.span: Incorrect â€” <span> is inline and flows within lines of text.
byOptionId.img: Incorrect â€” is inline (or replaced) by default, not a block container.
byOptionId.a: Incorrect â€” <a> is inline; it creates links not block-level layout.

explanations.overview: Hau formvollendet lüstern zart wüst rasant dröhnend formschön geigt kess dröhnend süsses fieses glattes weiches karges <span> einzig und lüstern rein stramm für glatt fettes spitzes wüstes nasses nacktes lautes karges Inline Grouping wild glatt stramm formschön raus pur dröhnend.

byOptionId.inline: Correct â€” <span> is for inline grouping and small styling hooks.
byOptionId.large: Incorrect â€” use block containers like <div> or semantic sections for large sections.
byOptionId.table: Incorrect â€” table rows use <tr>, not <span>.
byOptionId.image: Incorrect â€” embeds images; does not replace it.
